title: workspace — a living workspace under the repo
description: A BOUND type: the manager reading the living workspaces it lives among (template + examples/*), reporting each one's anatomy. Validated against the `workspaces` catalog projection; the full per-workspace anatomy is the (unvalidated) `workspace` detail projection.
